name: SCAQMD Permit to Construct (Rule 201)
what_it_does: Authorizes installing/modifying equipment that may emit air contaminants.

hypotheses.question: Does the new equipment require an SCAQMD Permit to Construct?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: SCAQMD Permit to Construct may apply before installing emitting equipment.

hypotheses.question: Do solvent VOC emissions require additional review?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: Solvent use may create VOC-related review needs.
